name: Broadleaf Co., Ltd.
summary: Broadleaf Co., Ltd. develops and provides software, and IT solutions and services for the automotive aftermarket, and other business sectors and industries in Japan. The company offers broadleaf cloud platform; IT solutions, such as customer management, sales management, and inventory management systems; and operations analysis software. It also provides big data analysis related to automobiles and other services to mobile phone distributors, travel agencies, bus operators, and machine tools dealers. Broadleaf Co., Ltd.s was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
